At Funded Trading Plus, we believe you, as a potential customer, should have all available information provided in advance to help you in your decision making process. We will never pressure you to participate in any of our challenges. Please use the information provided in our disclaimer to help inform your choices. All trading activity with FT+ takes place in a simulated environment using virtual funds. No real trading capital is provided or traded. Traders are compensated based on simulated profits in accordance with challenge Terms and Conditions.

ADVANTAGE
OPERATIONAL PHILOSOPHY
A New Standard Of Trading Challenges.

At Funded Trading Plus, we’re traders building a fairer way to succeed. Our infrastructure is built around real feedback to make trading challenge success achievable, transparent, and fast.

EXPLORE OUR CHALLENGES
01 // LEGACY
Real Traders, Real Experience

Founded by professional traders and educators since 2013. We didn't start yesterday; we've been in the pit.

02 // RESEARCH
Built Around Traders

Our 1-Step and 2-Step challenges are designed from research into what traders actually need to succeed.

03 // SCALE
Industry Leading Plan

Scale simulated balances up to $2.5 million in virtual capital with clear rules and no hidden reset penalties.

04 // RISK
Quality-Focused

We partner with skilled traders who understand risk and candlestick structure. We value quality over volume.

THE INDUSTRY STANDARD
Engineered for
Long-term Success.

We don't just provide a platform; we design environments where traders actually thrive. Our rules are built to minimize breaches, not engineer them.

FEATURE COMPARISON
FUNDED TRADING PLUS
STANDARD INDUSTRY
Rating & Trust

Top-rated firm with verified 5-star feedback from traders.

Poor ratings, hidden fees, and inconsistent rewards.

Challenge Options

1-Step, 2-Step, or Instant funding for your style.

One-size-fits-all challenges with restrictive rules.

Trading Freedom

Trade news, hold weekends, and hedge freely.

Unfair restrictions designed to make traders fail.

Reward Frequency

Fast weekly rewards with zero monthly recurring fees.

Slow scaling, limited rewards, and monthly delays.

Our Prop Firm Trader Reviews

Honesty, transparency, real support readily...

In my opinion one of the most fair and honest prop firms. My experience has always been good with FTP. Prompt replies via email or chat feature when ever an issue arrises as reasonable trading conditions clearly outlined from the get go. I am leaving this review after receiving my third payment from them problem free. They run a tight ship and do things the correct way, which is why I have chosen them as my go to for my trading activities. Currently happy trading on their platform and will continue to do so unless circumstances or rules change. The only downside is the trailing drawdown however with it in mind things are still manageable. I would say pricing on challenge accounts arent the cheapest but I like their trading conditions compared to other prop firms as they do not penalise you for news trading. So far so good, I hope it continues.

G
Glenn
Verified User

Clear rules on drawdowns and profit targets,...

After researching multiple firms, I’ve chosen FTP (Funded Trading Plus) to attempt my challenge because I loved these things about them: * Amazingly tight spreads on forex * Supports crypto (not all of them do) * Choice of TradingView, on top of MT5 & MT5 * Payout in 7 days * Active community and support on Discord It was a pleasant & smooth experience throughout the challenge and getting funded, with no “Gotchas” with clear dashboard and easy to understand drawdown rules.

M
Max
Verified User

Excellent customer service Clear and simple...

I've been working with Funded Trading Plus since December 2023. I've been funded multiple times and received multiple payouts. I can confirm that FTP has maintained excellent customer service, issuing funded accounts promptly after passing the evaluation phase one as well as upgrading their portal interface and making it the best portal and dashboard interface where you've all of your account information and performance in detailed fashion.

S
Shirwa
Verified User

Smooth and friendly trading rules and fast...

I can confidently say this is one of the best prop firms in the industry. After years of struggling and failing, I finally received my first payout with them, and the entire experience was outstanding. The process is incredibly fast — from getting a funded account to receiving payouts on demand. I received my first payout in less than 24 hours. The KYC process was smooth, and the support team is excellent — always responsive and quick to resolve any issues. What truly impressed me is their fairness and professionalism. Even though I breached a rule, they still honored my effort and granted me the funded account. That level of respect and understanding is rare in this industry. I was even able to receive a payout from a giveaway account, and they treated it exactly like a paid account without any complications. The rules and trading conditions are very clear, with no hidden tricks or unfair terms. I’m genuinely grateful for this experience and thankful to the team for being honest and trustworthy. I hope to trade with them again in the future and wish them continued success in this industry.

A
Ayman
Verified User

Trusted Prop Payouts since inception in master...

I bought a 10k Instant (Master proram) because of their reputation in the industry. Also, many people around received fully payouts since day 1 in this master program. I'm doing my best to request my payment and complete satisfactory this review later. Seems to be a trusted prop so far.

R
Robertson
Verified User

They are always available and very helpful...

Great customer support. Most of my questions are resolved with a quick chat with the live support which is very convenient. And if it does require a ticket they are always resolved quickly. The platform is always working and if there is a problem the problem is resolved very quickly and fairly. The payout process is incredibly simple and complete turn around was 2 days to receive my withdrawal. I would highly recommend this company.

N
noah
Verified User

Exceptional prop firm! They are incredibly...

I highly recommend this prop firm for its reliability and efficiency. Their trustworthiness is evident in their transparent communication and consistent, fair practices. Having worked with various firms, I can confidently say this one stands out for its integrity and commitment to traders' success. Speed is a significant advantage here. Whether processing withdrawals, providing support, or executing trades, everything is done promptly and professionally. This efficiency allows traders to focus on their strategies without administrative delays or technical issues. Customer support is exceptional, offering knowledgeable and friendly service that makes a significant difference, especially during critical trading moments. Their educational resources and mentoring programs are also invaluable, providing insights and guidance to help traders improve and succeed. Overall, this prop firm is exemplary: trustworthy, fast, and dedicated to traders' success. My experience has been entirely positive, and I highly recommend their services to anyone looking to advance their trading career.

K
kishor
Verified User

quick payout

Excellent company, all procedures are very quick, phase 1 and financed phase. The execution of their partner broker is also good and I didn't have any problems with slippage, support is quick too. Excellent experience and the dashboard could improve. Payout takes 2 hours and is now available.

Even though I breached a rule, they still honored my effort and granted me the funded account. That level of respect and understanding is rare in this industry. I was even able to receive a payout from a giveaway account, and they treated it exactly like a paid account without any complications. The rules and trading conditions are very clear, with no hidden tricks or unfair terms. I’m genuinely grateful for this experience and thankful to the team for being honest and trustworthy. I hope to trade with them again in the future and wish them continued success in this industry.
